name: UnSub (Russia-nexus) — GTIG
brief: An unattributed Russia-nexus actor delivered AI-enabled malware (CANFAIL, LONGSTREAM) against Ukraine that uses LLM-generated decoy code (repetitive benign filler routines) to obfuscate its malicious functionality. GTIG
ttpMd:
**LLM-aided development** T1587.001 - Develop Capabilities: Malware

T1027 - Obfuscated Files/Information (LLM-generated decoy code)
